basic_details.job_title: Salem DHEW – Gender Specialist-II and IT Assistant – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Salem District Women Empowerment Hub (Salem DHEW) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Gender Specialist-II and IT Assistant. Candidates with MSW, MA, Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Salem DHEW official website salem.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work / Social Disciplines, Graduation with working knowledge in computers/IT

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Salem DHEW Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
